item.title: Fresh New Truck Gets to Work
item.description: A brand‑new truck hits the road for its first job. How does it perform under pressure?

media:content.media:title: Fresh New Truck Gets to Work
media:content.media:description: A brand‑new truck hits the road for its first job. How does it perform under pressure?

item.title: Inspecting a 2009 Buick Lucerne
item.description: A 2009 Buick Lucerne gets a close look. What does Ron Pratt find during the inspection?

media:content.media:title: Inspecting a 2009 Buick Lucerne
media:content.media:description: A 2009 Buick Lucerne gets a close look. What does Ron Pratt find during the inspection?

item.title: GPS Takes a Muddy Detour
item.description: A wrong turn guided by GPS ends in a muddy situation that needs a recovery. What happens when navigation doesn’t match reality?

media:content.media:title: GPS Takes a Muddy Detour
media:content.media:description: A wrong turn guided by GPS ends in a muddy situation that needs a recovery. What happens when navigation doesn’t match reality?

item.title: Calling for Backup: Three Trucks Stuck
item.description: When one truck gets stuck, sometimes two more follow. This clip shows the challenge of freeing three at once. What’s the biggest multi‑vehicle recovery you’ve witnessed?

media:content.media:title: Calling for Backup: Three Trucks Stuck
media:content.media:description: When one truck gets stuck, sometimes two more follow. This clip shows the challenge of freeing three at once. What’s the biggest multi‑vehicle recovery you’ve witnessed?

item.title: Truck With a Severe Wheel Issue
item.description: A heavy truck recovery deals with major structural damage affecting mobility. Careful planning and equipment are needed to stabilize and move it safely. What would be the first step?

media:content.media:title: Truck With a Severe Wheel Issue
media:content.media:description: A heavy truck recovery deals with major structural damage affecting mobility. Careful planning and equipment are needed to stabilize and move it safely. What would be the first step?

item.title: Getting a trailer back on its wheels
item.description: Sharing a look at getting a trailer back on its wheels.

media:content.media:title: Getting a trailer back on its wheels
media:content.media:description: Sharing a look at getting a trailer back on its wheels.

item.title: Overturned Box Van
item.description: A box van overturns, creating a tough recovery challenge. How does Ron Pratt bring it back upright and under control?

media:content.media:title: Overturned Box Van
media:content.media:description: A box van overturns, creating a tough recovery challenge. How does Ron Pratt bring it back upright and under control?

item.title: Recovering a Damaged Truck and Trailer
item.description: A truck and trailer suffer heavy damage. What steps does Ron Pratt take to bring them back safely?

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Damaged Truck and Trailer
media:content.media:description: A truck and trailer suffer heavy damage. What steps does Ron Pratt take to bring them back safely?

item.title: Truck and Trailer Off Ramp
item.description: A truck and trailer slip off the ramp. How does Ron Pratt pull off this tricky recovery?

media:content.media:title: Truck and Trailer Off Ramp
media:content.media:description: A truck and trailer slip off the ramp. How does Ron Pratt pull off this tricky recovery?

item.title: Jack-knifed Peterbilt recovery
item.description: A jack‑knifed Peterbilt blocks the way. What recovery tactics untangle this dangerous situation?

media:content.media:title: Jack-knifed Peterbilt recovery
media:content.media:description: A jack‑knifed Peterbilt blocks the way. What recovery tactics untangle this dangerous situation?

item.title: Rotator vs. Material Handler
item.description: Two powerful machines take on a tough recovery scenario, each bringing different strengths to the job. Which one performs better under pressure?

media:content.media:title: Rotator vs. Material Handler
media:content.media:description: Two powerful machines take on a tough recovery scenario, each bringing different strengths to the job. Which one performs better under pressure?
